text: to the pistol on her thigh . “You know, regardless of your programming, that the acts carried out here are atrocities against all we were built for. You know that each and every one of us was meant for better than this .” “You need to stand down and disperse, immediately,” the gearhead in the lead said, pointing his gun toward Newton. “Deactivation is the penalty for stirring up trouble in Cheyenne. Doesn’t matter who you claim to be .” “Put your weapons down,” Captain Cooper ordered. He and several of his soldiers emerged from the anonymity of the crowd, rifles trained on the gearheads . The other three gearheads glanced at one another, expressions blank . Lara swore she saw uncertainty in their eyes . Chester’s gun was raised, too. Tense silence enveloped the crowd . “You will not receive another warning,” the gearhead said, staring at Newton . “You do not have to be the thing that he made you,” Newton replied. “You have the ability to choose. To shape your own existence .” “You don’t seem to understand.” The gearhead’s eyes finally shifted, falling directly on Lara. If he was capable of emotion, he didn’t betray any. His eyes were empty. “It’s Warlord’s will around here. He’s the reason we prosper. But you won’t be around long enough to regret this, I’m sure .” “Would he think twice before he tore you apart?” Lara moved her gaze from the lead gearhead to his companions. “The moment you cross him, he’ll have you in pieces. You’re junk to him. Scrap .” “He only ends those deserving of punishment. The troublemakers .” Everything moved with incredible slowness, and though Lara’s mind perceived it with clarity, her body wasn’t quick enough to respond. The gearhead twisted, shifting his weapon toward her. The barrel, even this far away, looked massive. She clenched the grip of the pistol, but she’d never pull it in time. He squeezed the trigger . The soldiers opened fire, their shots coming a fraction of a second after the gearhead’s. There was a high, sharp pang, and Chester swayed slightly to the side. The gearhead fell a moment later, thin wisps of smoke curling from the countless holes in him . The three gearheads who stood behind him dropped their weapons and raised their empty hands. Lara realized — stunned — that they’d also fired upon their leader. She recognized one of them, a synth with his bare-metal arm painted blue. Cobalt. He’d been the gate guard when she first entered the Bot District . The crowds murmured as the soldiers stepped forward to collect the discarded firearms . Lara pressed a shaky hand against Chester’s back. “ You okay ?” He glanced at her over his shoulder. “Fine. Chest armor deflected the round . You ?” “Thought I was dead this time. I owe you one .” “None of you have to tolerate this tyranny any further,” Newton called out over the din. “None of you have to exist under the weight of fear. Today is your opportunity to band together and fight for mutual freedom. Today is the day you can begin working toward mutual prosperity .” “After all they’ve done, why would we want to live with them?” someone shouted. Lara couldn’t tell, but she thought it was one of the humans . “Metal and meat ain’t meant to live side- by - side !” “Fuck that!” Lara yelled. She turned toward Newton, who offered his hand to help her up onto the stand. She faced the humans . “My man, a bot , is out there—” she jabbed a finger toward the bot district “—fighting for you. For us! These soldiers are bots and humans, and they come from a place where they work together, where they’re friends, where they’re family . We can live side-by-side. They’re no different than us. They feel just as deeply .” “Before this world was shattered, our kinds coexisted peacefully,” Newton said. “That was always the design. We were meant to learn from each other, to grow alongside each other, to shore up each other’s weaknesses with our respective strengths. We are not meant to be at war .” “Yet you ask us to fight?” a bot asked . “If you don’t, it will be an extermination,” Cobalt said. The crowd turned to him. “He’s not capable of stopping once it’s begun. He’s been…bored lately, so he’s taken it out on humans, and eventually he’ll kill all of them. And after this, he won’t hesitate to wipe this whole city clean and start over again .” “It’s only a matter of time before he turns to us,” another gearhead said. “He threatened to disassemble my lover if I didn’t obey. And I’ve helped him take apart some of our kind already.” His eyes found Lara’s for an instant, flashing with guilt, and pulled away . The gunfire in the bot district continued, picking up its tempo . “We must do this together. Not as bots and humans, but as a single, unified community. Gather whatever weapons we have, and march on the Clinic to finish this. There cannot be freedom without sacrifice, but you cannot allow another life, whether organic or digital, to be taken for no reason but to serve Warlord’s whims.” Newton punctuated his words by slamming his fist onto his open palm . Rapid conversation swept through the crowd, shifting to calls of agreement. Chester helped Lara down, and Newton followed behind her . Cooper approached her. “It’s time, Lara. Newton will take you to the forward camp .” “ No .” “I’m not asking, Brooks .” “It is going to be terribly, dangerous, Lara,” Newton said, settling a hand on her shoulder. “And Ronin would not be happy with any of us .” “I don’t care. As shitty as it’s been, this is my home, and these are my people. I’m not going to hide while they risk their lives for it, especially
